title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page. It keeps showing a blank screen after clicking login.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Payment fails during checkout with an unknown transaction error.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Customers cannot upload profile images. The upload button does not respond.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: Ticket statistics are not updating in real-time on the admin dashboard.

title: Email notification not received
description: Users are not receiving email notifications after submitting a ticket.

title: Slow page loading speed
description: Support dashboard takes too long to load ticket data.

title: Cannot reset password
description: Password reset link expires immediately after being generated.

title: UI broken on mobile devices
description: Layout breaks on smaller screens and buttons overlap.

title: Search functionality not working
description: Searching tickets by title or ID does not return any results.

title: Error 500 on ticket submission
description: Submitting a new ticket results in a server error.

title: Notification badge not updating
description: The notification icon does not reflect new ticket counts.

title: Unable to change ticket priority
description: Admin users cannot update ticket priority from the dashboard.

title: File attachment not downloading
description: Attached files cannot be downloaded from resolved tickets.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out automatically after only a few minutes of inactivity.

title: Dark mode toggle not working
description: Switching between light and dark mode does not update the UI theme.
